name: Multimodal Document Understanding & Structural Parsing
nameZh: 多模态文档理解与结构化解析
description: Designed and implemented an end-to-end document parsing system with batch processing, checkpointing, and exception retry, improving stability and reproducibility.
descriptionZh: 设计并实现文档解析端到端系统，支持批量处理、断点续跑及异常重试，提升任务执行稳定性与可复现性。
details: Optimized GPU inference environments (CUDA/dependency conflict resolution), significantly increasing parsing efficiency.
Built data cleaning and synthetic enhancement pipelines for improved model robustness in complex layouts.
Implemented a complete evaluation loop with metrics monitoring (mAP/F1/BLEU/TEDS) for continuous optimization.
detailsZh: 优化 GPU 推理环境（CUDA/依赖冲突排查），显著提升解析效率并降低运行失败率。
构建数据清洗与合成增强管道，提升模型在复杂版式与噪声文档场景下的鲁棒性。
实现评测闭环与指标监控，支持多指标（mAP/F1/BLEU/TEDS）自动化评估与持续优化。

name: Luojia Digital Math Assistant
type: Intelligent Agent System Research (University Level Competition)
typeZh: 智能体系统研发项目 (校级竞赛)
description: A multimodal math reasoning agent based on RAG and Tool-Calling for Higher Mathematics and Linear Algebra.
descriptionZh: 基于 RAG 与工具调用的多模态数学推理智能体，支持高等数学与线性代数的教学与解题。
details: Built a low-code teaching agent supporting text and image input, integrating OCR, knowledge base retrieval (RAG), and Python tool calling.
Designed an 'Intent Recognition - Tool Call - Result Verification' workflow using SymPy/NumPy for calculation validation and visualization.
Collaborated on building a specialized math knowledge base and evaluation dataset from textbooks and open-source data.
detailsZh: 基于低代码平台搭建面向高等数学/线性代数的教学智能体，支持文本与图片输入，集成 OCR、知识库检索 (RAG) 与 Python 工具调用。
设计 “意图识别—工具调用—结果验证” 的智能体工作流，结合 SymPy/NumPy 完成计算验证与可视化，提升复杂数学问题求解的可靠性。
参与构建数学领域知识库与评测数据集（教材+开源数据），完成数据清洗、结构化处理与检索优化。
